privacy: Artwork, projects and preferences stay on the device unless the person using AIR-DROW explicitly exports, shares or starts an optional AI creation.
releaseGate: npm run vercel:build validates source integrity, local hand assets, bilingual markup, runtime coverage, export/gesture unit checks, theme tokens, documentation and generated production output.
support: Use Settings > About App to review app readiness, hand drawing readiness, language, release information and developer profile.
name: AIR-DROW Export, Gesture & Reliability Edition
summary: High-resolution/print-aware export, protected hand color palette, two-finger eraser, local diagnostics and resilient input recovery.
